title: Selective BTK inhibition profile of acalabrutinib
text: Acalabrutinib showed biochemical IC50 of 5.1 nM against BTK and improved selectivity relative to earlier inhibitors.

title: Kinase selectivity patterns in covalent BTK inhibitors
text: Selectivity across TEC, EGFR and ERBB4 varied depending on scaffold substitutions and assay context.

title: ADMET considerations for kinase inhibitors
text: Permeability and hERG concerns remain important for small-molecule kinase inhibitor optimization.
